prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `fbf15a0b`.
codex_response:
`fbf15a0b` keeps the half that contains the two `5` markers, then replaces those `5`s with background `8`. I discarded both summary hints because they reverse that keep/discard direction; the correction is recorded in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_fbf15a0b/notes.md#L1).

I added the ARC2 task package at [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_fbf15a0b/__init__.py#L1), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_fbf15a0b/verifier.py#L1), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_fbf15a0b/generator.py#L1). The verifier is a direct DSL-style half-selection solver, and the generator builds sparse single-color stripe panels on background `8`, pairs them with a same-family distractor half, and places the `5` markers on the retained half’s corner edge. No new primitive was needed; `arc2/dsl_ext.py` was unchanged.

Validation succeeded: official verifier passed `6/6`, and the shared builder produced 1000 verified examples. Outputs are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/fbf15a0b/task.json), example JSONs in [/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/fbf15a0b/examples](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/fbf15a0b/examples), and previews at [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/fbf15a0b/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/fbf15a0b/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/fbf15a0b/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/fbf15a0b/previews/preview_03.png).
